name: 18q11_2_SD_module
description: 18q11.2 SD modules near GATA6 and ROCK1P1. Two direct-orientation SD blocks flanking GATA6 mediate rare ~3 Mb 18q11.2 microdeletions linked to congenital heart defects.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~50-100 kb at ~97% identity; share GREB1L and ROCK1P1 paralog content with chr17 paralogs.
